description_long: This is a vintage-style coupe pickup truck with a deep burgundy body, black fenders, and wooden side rails on the cargo bed. The front features a classic grille with brass accents and two round headlights, while the wheels have whitewall tires and intricate spoke designs. The cab is compact with a single row of seating, and the doors display faint lettering, suggesting a custom or business livery. The rear cargo bed is open, lined with wooden planks, and enclosed by wooden slats, giving it a utilitarian yet elegant appearance. The roof is solid and black, contrasting with the rest of the body, and the exhaust pipes are prominently visible along the side. Overall, the vehicle exudes an early 20th-century aesthetic, blending metal and wood elements for a distinctive, period-correct look.
description: A vintage burgundy coupe pickup truck with wooden side rails, brass accents, and whitewall tires, featuring a classic grille and open cargo bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the classic grille, brass radiator, and round headlights, with the narrow cab and fenders visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden side rails, detailed wheels, visible exhaust pipes, and faint door lettering.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open wooden cargo bed, wooden slats, and the back of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wooden rails, black fenders, and the overall length of the vehicle.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
